fault_hypothesis: The code on line 68 incorrectly removes an element from the merged list. This happens when both input lists share the same final element, due to a faulty conditional check on line 67.

constraints.intent: The length of the merged list must be the sum of input lengths after any modifications.

spec.expr: sum(1 for x in merged__1 if x == left[-1]) == sum(1 for x in left if x == left[-1]) + sum(1 for x in right if x == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The count of the shared last element must be preserved in the merged list.
After extending with remaining elements, the list length must be correct.
The final returned list must contain all elements from both inputs.
